creator: manfred@usselmann.ch
text:
(In reply to Manfred Usselmann from comment #12)

Btw. syncing with nextcloudcmd works without issues. At least if you do it for the top level folders one by one.

E.g. 

nextcloudcmd -u (user) -p (password) --path /(Folder1)/ (local/path/)(Folder1)/ https://(nc_server).(tld)
nextcloudcmd -u (user) -p (password) --path /(Folder2)/ (local/path/)(Folder2)/ https://(nc_server).(tld)

To me this shows that there is no real network problem but something is wrong with the combination of the nextcloud client, qt5 and FreeBSD.
